CONTENT.Club career: A youth product of Ecole de Football Brasseries du Cameroun since 2012, Mughe transferred to Marseille on 24 June 2022, signing a five-year contract. He was originally assigned to Marseille's reserves, before training with their senior team in early 2023. He made his professional debut with Marseille as a late substitute in a 2–2 (7–6) penalty shootout loss in the Coupe de France to Annecy on 1 March 2023, scoring his side's second goal in the 90+6th minute.On 1 February 2024, Mughe was loaned out to Ligue 2 side Dunkerque until the end of the season.
CONTENT.Playing style: Mughe is a strong and fast right-footed winger who can play on both sides. He is good with both feet, strong in one-on-ones and has good technique.
CONTENT.External links: Olympique de Marseille profileFrançois Mughe at SoccerwayFrançois Mughe at BDFutbolLigue 1 profile
CONTENT.International career: Mughe was due to be called up to the Cameroon U17s for the 2021 Africa U-17 Cup of Nations, but the tournament was cancelled due to the COVID-19 pandemic. He played for the Cameroon U23s for a set of 2023 U-23 Africa Cup of Nations qualification matches in March 2023.

SUMMARY: François-Régis Mughe (born 16 June 2004) is a Cameroonian professional footballer who plays as a winger for Ligue 1 club Marseille.
